title: Important Tax Relief: TDS Exemption on Aircraft and Ship Lease Rentals to IFSC Units!
content:
# Important Tax Relief: TDS Exemption on Aircraft and Ship Lease Rentals to IFSC Units!

Ek important update hai! Government ne International Financial Services Centres (IFSCs) mein aircraft aur ship leasing units ko promote karne ke liye ek significant announcement kiya hai. Central Board of Direct Taxes (CBDT) ne specific conditions ke saath, aircraft aur ship lease rentals par Tax Deducted at Source (TDS) se exemption notify ki hai.

Yeh move India ke IFSC ecosystem mein asset leasing activities ko boost karega aur businesses ke liye ease of doing business badhaega.

**Key Highlights:**

*   **Exemption Scope:** Ab, aircraft aur ship ke lease rent ya supplemental lease rent payments par TDS deduct nahi karna hoga, agar yeh payments eligible IFSC units ko kiye ja rahe hain.
*   **Conditions Apply:** Yeh exemption tabhi milegi jab lessor (IFSC unit) Income-tax Act, 2025 ke Section 147 ke तहत 20 consecutive tax years ke liye deduction claim karne ka option opt kare aur prescribed Form No. 1(N) mein statement-cum-declaration submit kare.
*   **Effective Date:** Yeh exemptions retrospective effect se 1st April, 2026 se applicable hain.
*   **Notifications:** Is sambandh mein CBDT ne Notification No. 74/2026 (aircraft leasing ke liye) aur Notification No. 75/2026 (ship leasing ke liye), dono July 3, 2026 ko jari ki hain.

Is kadam se IFSC mein aircraft aur ship leasing ka framework aur strong hoga, aur cash flow friction kam hoga.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://www.incometaxindia.gov.in/news/notifications.htm)

*Published on: 5 July 2026*
